MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Compromise of Pending Action Person with a Disability. Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Giselle Casey, CSR#8098.

Ronald H. Rouda, Esq., June P. Bashanti, Esq., and Mercy L. Hall, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Sharon Anolik, daughter and guardian ad litem for Person with a Disability, Alexander Anolik, not present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $788,250.00
Attorney's Fees: $262,750.00 payable to Law Firm of Rouda, Feder, Tietjen & McGuinn
Costs: $182,699.00
A net balance of $342,801.00 to be deposited into an account: Sharon A Anolik, Conservator for the Benefit of Alexander Anolik.

Additional orders: The Medicare set-aside amount will be pursuant to the Medivest analyis in the amount of $35,735.08 to be managed by the conservator. The Medicare lien amount (on appeal) will be held in Attorneys trust account until the lien is finalized. Upon resolution of the Medicare lien plaintiffs counsel will send a check directly to Medicare and any remaining funds will be sent directly to the conserved account.

Court signed Order Granting approval for Person with a Disability and Order to Deposit Money into Account named Sharon A Anolik, Conservator for the Benefit of Alexander Anolik.
Status Hearing Scheduled on May 19, 2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into above named account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.
